_comment_1: Drive roots for pyaar-sync scripts. Edit when drive names change.
_comment_2: v3 = master archive (canonical). v1 = staging/subset for DJ sets.
_comment_3: Env vars PYAAR_V1_ROOT and PYAAR_V3_ROOT override these.
_comment_4: restore.sh installs this to ~/.config/pyaar-sync/drives.json — VERIFY the paths match your actual mounted drive names after recovery.
